source: Interactive Brokers — inferred from public Jan-2025 policy
note: IBKR publicly announced a 50% minimum maintenance across all MicroStrategy (Strategy Inc.) products in Jan 2025. STRC is Strategy's variable-rate perpetual preferred (listed Oct 2025) and is inferred to fall under that umbrella — not confirmed via IBKR's per-ticker margin tool (requires login). Robinhood sets margin dynamically and is not publicly disclosed; these IBKR figures are the closest public proxy. Verify in your Robinhood app before sizing into STRC/EPD positions.

STRC.notes: Inferred from IBKR's Jan 2025 policy covering all MSTR-family products. Alex's independent estimate also landed at ~50%. Treat as a floor — Robinhood may require more.

EPD.notes: Large-cap MLP, ~$65B cap, tight bid/ask. IBKR baseline for liquid yield equities runs 25-30%. Reg T federal minimum is 25%.
